arts.ttl: Tottenham receive Mauricio Pochettino decision on replacing Ange Postecoglou in North London?
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are unlikely to replace Ange Postecoglou with former head coach Mauricio Pochettino in the near future, with the Argentine currently managing USA.

arts.ttl: Tottenham transfer news: Spurs see £50m bid accepted for Bayern Munich attacker?
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are reportedly leading the race for Bayern Munich youngster Mathys Tel, with Spurs seeing a £50m bid for the Frenchman accepted.

arts.ttl: Micky van de Ven RETURNS to Tottenham starting line-up in major boost for Ange Postecoglou after being sidelined for two months
arts.sum: The defender has not played since the 4-3 defeat by Chelsea on December 8 after sustaining a hamstring injury.

arts.ttl: Final Europa League matchday predicted as Tottenham discover European fate
arts.sum: Tottenham take on Elfsborg in the final round of the Europa League league phase later today, where Spurs know three points will confirm their place in the Europa League knockout stages. Spurs fans will also be keeping an eye out on other results from the final batch of league phase games to see who Postecoglou's side could face in the knockout stages.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou's big Tottenham problem highlighted as we simulated injury XI vs available XI clash
arts.sum: We then lined up the Spurs unavailable XI in a 4-3-3 formation (and without injuries, of course), with their line-up as follows: Vicario; Spence, Romero, Van de Ven, Udogie; Sarr, Bissouma, Maddison; Johnson, Solanke, Richarlison. The available XI had more of the ball in the opening stages of the game, but against Cristian Romero and Micky van de Ven, the attackers found it difficult to break through on goal and create any clear-cut chances.

arts.ttl: Tottenham set for Man Utd showdown as new signing speaks out
arts.sum: Victorious at Crystal Palace in the league last Sunday following a 3-2 triumph, Spurs were on the losing side on Wednesday evening as Everton progressed through to the next stage of the FA Cup after claiming a 2-0 win. Following the team's FA Cup defeat at Everton, Spurs return to action on Sunday with a home showdown against Manchester United at Tottenham Hotspur Stadium.

arts.ttl: Tottenham v Elfsborg, Rangers v Union Saint-Gilloise, and more: Europa League – live
arts.sum: Updates from the final round of league-phase matches Join Michael Butler for Steaua v Manchester United Live scoreboard | How they stand | Email Scott GOAL! Braga 1-0 Lazio (Horta 6). Victor Gómez advances down the right and cuts back for his captain Ricardo Horta, who whips into the bottom left. A lovely goal, and so Braga are on for the win they need to survive. Lazio, the table toppers, have little or nothing to play for. Tottenham Hotspur 0-0 Elfsborg. A sprightly start for Spurs as Mikey Moore spins in from the right touchline and attacks the visiting defence. The ball’s switched to Son Heung-Min on the other flank. A scuffed shot. But a promising early attack. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Bayern and Tottenham reach agreement for Mathys Tel
arts.sum: According to various reports, Bayern Munich and Tottenham have agreed a deal for Mathys Tel, but the player himself has yet to decide whether he wants the move to happen.

arts.ttl: Tottenham in advanced talks with Bayern Munich over £50m Mathys Tel deal
arts.sum: Teenage forward keen to leave German giants in pursuit of first-team football

arts.ttl: “Reached a verbal agreement’ – Sky Sports’ Florian Plettenberg drops exciting Tottenham update
arts.sum: Tottenham have reportedly reached a verbal agreement with Bayern Munich to sign highly-rated forward Mathys Tel in a deal worth €60 million, marking a major breakthrough in the transfer saga. The young French striker has been heavily linked with a move away from the Bundesliga champions, attracting interest from Chelsea, Arsenal, and Manchester United in […] The post “Reached a verbal agreement’ – Sky Sports’ Florian Plettenberg drops exciting Tottenham update appeared first on CaughtOffside.
